name: Creamy Brownie Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Hershey's Cocoa or European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat together the butter, cocoa, corn syrup, and vanilla until well blended.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar and milk, beating until smooth and of spreading consistency.
YIELD: about 1 3/4 cups frosting
